eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Kerr, TX; at 4:00 AM on JUL 16, 2026 Effective until 12:00 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Evacuation of residents along Quinlan Creek and Shelter in place for all others outside the Quinlan Creek Area Move to higher Ground
